content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:RoleplayingGameCoreRulebook.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'' released in November 2000.]]

A list of events in '''2000''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' published.
*[[January 3|03]] – [[Star Wars Insider 47|''Star Wars Insider'' 47]] published.
*[[January 5|05]] – [[Star Wars Tales 2|''Star Wars Tales'' 2]] published.
*[[January 12|12]] – [[Union 3|''Union'' 3]] published.
*[[January 19|19]] – [[Chewbacca (2000) 1|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 1]] published.
*19 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace 2|''Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace'' 2]] published.
*[[January 22|22]] – [[Craig Claiborne]] dies.
*[[January 26|26]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 14|''Star Wars'' (1998) 14]] published.
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Gil Kane]] dies.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Uncertain Path]]'' published.
*[[February 2|02]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution (TPB)|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[February 3|03]] – UK Paperback Edition of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''The Phantom Menace'']] published by [[Arrow Books Ltd.|Arrow]].
*[[February 16|16]] – ''[[Sergio Aragonés Stomps Star Wars]]'' published.
*16 – [[Union 4|''Union'' 4]] published.
*16 – ''[[Chewbacca (2000) 2|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 2]] published.
*[[February 19|19]] – [[George Roussos]] dies.
*[[February 23|23]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 15|''Star Wars'' (1998) 15]] published.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Netmarble Games]] is founded.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 7: Capture Arawynne]]'' published.
*[[March 7|07]] – [[Charlie Gray]] dies.
*[[March 15|15]] – [[Chewbacca (2000) 3|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 3]] published.
*[[March 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: Anakin's Speedway]]'' released.
*[[March 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 16|''Star Wars'' (1998) 16]] published.
*22 – ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' released on the PC platform.
*[[March 28|28]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Pilot]]'' published.
*28 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Queen]]'' published.
*[[March 29|29]] – [[Star Wars Tales 3|''Star Wars Tales'' 3]] published.
*?? – [[Dark Horse Extra|''Dark Horse Extra'' issue 21]] begins ''[[Hard Currency]]'', finishes in June.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Episode I Journal: Darth Maul]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]''
*[[April 4|04]] – [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] published.
*04 – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Dreamcast|Dreamcast]] platform.
*04 – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Widescreen Video Collector's Edition|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' Widescreen Video Collector's Edition]] released.
*04 – [[Star Wars Insider 48|''Star Wars Insider'' 48]] published.
*[[April 5|05]] – ''[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire]]'' published.
*[[April 8|08]] – [[Alfredo Alcala]] dies.
*[[April 19|19]] – [[Chewbacca (2000) 4|''Star Wars: Chewbacca'' 4]] published.
*[[April 26|26]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 17|''Star Wars'' (1998) 17]] published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 9: Rescue in the Core]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 9: Rescue in the Core]]'' published.
*[[May 2|02]] – ''[[Rogue Planet]]'' published.
*[[May 5|05]]-[[May 7|07]] – The second [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event since [[1997]] begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios|Disney-MGM Studios]].
*[[May 10|10]] – [[Star Wars Insider 49|''Star Wars Insider'' 49]] is released for subscribers.
*[[May 12|12]]-[[May 14|14]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[May 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Insider 49|''Star Wars Insider'' 49]] published.
*[[May 19|19]]-[[May 21|21]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[May 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 18|''Star Wars'' (1998) 18]] published.
*[[May 26|26]]-[[May 28|28]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[May 30|30]] – [[Star Wars: Republic: Prelude to Rebellion (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: Prelude to Rebellion'' trade paperback]] published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 10: Festival of Warriors]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 10: Festival of Warriors]]'' published.
*[[June 6|06]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' published.
*[[June 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Masquerade (TPB)|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Masquerade'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[June 21|21]] – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]] published.
*21 – ''[[Aurra's Song]]'' published.
*[[June 22|22]] – [[Myrna Velasco]] is born.
*[[June 28|28]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 19|''Star Wars'' (1998) 19]] published.
*28 – [[Star Wars Tales 4|''Star Wars Tales'' 4]] published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 11: Pirates from Beyond the Sea]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 11: Pirates from Beyond the Sea]]'' published.
*[[July 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Insider 50|''Star Wars Insider'' 50]] released for subscribers.
*[[July 17|17]] – [[Star Wars Insider 50|''Star Wars Insider'' 50]] published.
*[[July 19|19]] – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 2]] published.
*[[July 26|26]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 20|''Star Wars'' (1998) 20]] published.
*[[July 28|28]] – ''[[Chic Stone]]'' dies.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 12: The Bongo Rally]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 12: The Bongo Rally]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]'' published.
*[[August 5|05]] – Sir [[Alec Guinness]] dies.
*[[August 9|09]] – [[Star Wars: Union (TPB)|''Star Wars: Union'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[August 23|23]] – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 3|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 3]] published.
*23 – [[Star Wars (1998) 21|''Star Wars'' (1998) 21]] published.
*[[August 29|29]] – [[Shelagh Fraser]] dies.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 13: Danger on Naboo]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 13: Danger on Naboo]]'' published.
*[[September 6|06]] – [[Darth Maul (2000) 1|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 1]] published.
*[[September 20|20]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']] finishes.
*20 – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 4|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 4]] published.
*[[September 26|26]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters (TPB)|Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters trade paperback]]'' published.
*[[September 27|27]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 22|''Star Wars'' (1998) 22]] published.
*27 – [[Star Wars Tales 5|''Star Wars Tales'' 5]] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 14: Podrace to Freedom]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 14: Podrace to Freedom]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Episode I]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' published.
*[[October 3|03]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' published.
*03 – ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' published
*[[October 4|04]] – [[Darth Maul (2000) 2|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 2]] published.
*[[October 9|09]] – [[David Dukes]] dies.
*[[October 25|25]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 23|''Star Wars'' (1998) 23]] published.
*?? – ''[[Aurra Sing: Dawn of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – [[Darth Maul (2000) 3|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 3]] published.
*01 – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 15: The Final Battle]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 15: The Final Battle]]'' published.
*[[November 8|08]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Agent of Doom]]'' published.
*[[November 12|12]] – ''[[Star Wars: Demolition]]'' released.
*[[November 14|14]] – ''[[Darth Maul's Revenge]]'' published.
*[[November 16|16]] – ''[[Demolition: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Coco Grayson]] is born.
*[[November 20|20]] – ''[[Battle in the Streets!]]'' released on [[Wizards.com]].
*[[November 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 24|''Star Wars'' (1998) 24]] published.
*22 – ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'' published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].
*22 – ''[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Gamer 1|''Star Wars Gamer'' 1]] published.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter]]'' published.
*[[December 6|06]] – [[Darth Maul (2000) 4|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 4]] published.
*[[December 13|13]] – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Mandatory Retirement (TPB)|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Mandatory Retirement'' trade paperback]] published.
*13 – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 1|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 1]] published.
*[[December 18|18]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]].
*[[December 19|19]] – ''[[Podracing Tales]]'' published online at [[StarWars.com]].
*[[December 20|20]] – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 1]] published.
*20 – [[Star Wars Tales 6|''Star Wars Tales'' 6]] published.
*[[December 27|27]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 25|''Star Wars'' (1998) 25]] published.

==Unknown==
*''[[Child of Light saga|''Child of Light'' saga]] published.
**''[[Child of Light]]''
**''[[Soulsaber (adventure)|Soulsaber]]''
**''[[Light and Dark (adventure)|Light and Dark]]''
*''[[Star Wars Gamer Special Edition]]'' published.

----
